Homes for Sale Section Header: Condominiums for Sale in Longboat Key Club
Homes for Sale Template Header: Condos for Sale in Longboat Key Club
About Neighborhood Description:
Longboat Key Club is a master-planned luxury resort and residential community located on the southern end of Longboat Key, widely regarded as one of the island’s most prestigious coastal living environments. Spanning hundreds of acres from Sarasota Bay to the Gulf of Mexico, the club blends private residences, condominium towers, resort lodging, golf, marina facilities, and hospitality services into a single gated campus.

At the heart of the community is the Longboat Key Club resort infrastructure, which includes championship golf, tennis facilities, private beach access, spa and wellness services, marina amenities, and multiple dining venues. The club’s Harbourside Golf Course overlooks Sarasota Bay, while the Links on Longboat course runs along the Gulf, giving members access to two distinct championship playing experiences within the same property.

The Tennis Gardens at Longboat Key Club feature professional-level courts, instruction, and tournament programming, making racquet sports a major lifestyle pillar within the community. Wellness amenities extend to a full-service spa, fitness facilities, and wellness programming integrated into the resort environment.

Marina access is another defining feature, with the Longboat Key Club Moorings offering deep-water slips capable of accommodating larger vessels, along with fueling, dock services, and boat club infrastructure. This makes the club one of the few places on Longboat Key where golf, beach, and yachting lifestyles intersect within a single residential setting.

Residential ownership within Longboat Key Club spans a range of condominium communities - including luxury towers such as L’Ambiance, Regent Place, Sanctuary, Privateer, Pierre, Beaches, and others - each with its own building-specific amenities layered on top of club privileges. While club membership is typically optional, it unlocks the full resort experience across golf, tennis, dining, spa, and marina services.

From a buyer profile standpoint, Longboat Key Club appeals to those seeking a resort-integrated residential lifestyle - where beachfront living, championship golf, tennis programming, and marina access are all available within a secure, gated coastal campus. It is especially compelling for buyers who want full-service luxury living with the flexibility to engage in club amenities as much - or as little - as they choose.
Neighborhood Subtitle: Discover Longboat Key Club, a master-planned luxury resort community offering championship golf, tennis gardens, spa services, marina access, and private beach club amenities.
Neighborhood Short Description: Longboat Key Club is a master-planned resort and residential community offering golf, tennis, spa, dining, marina, and private beach club amenities. It delivers a full luxury resort lifestyle tied to multiple condominium residences within the gated campus.
Amenities Short Description: Longboat Key Club is a master-planned resort and residential community offering golf, tennis, spa, dining, marina, and private beach club amenities. It delivers a full luxury resort lifestyle tied to multiple condominium residences within the gated campus.

Streets are quiet and residential, and the gated entry adds an extra layer of privacy compared to non-gated island neighborhoods.

Waterfront properties typically feature private docks with access to Sarasota Bay and the Intracoastal Waterway, making Emerald Pointe appealing to boating buyers who want a protected harbor setting. Interior homes still benefit from the Bay Isles environment — manicured landscaping, consistent architectural standards, and proximity to the Longboat Key Club corridor.

Buyers considering Emerald Pointe are often looking for a balance of prestige, security, and boating capability within a well-established master association. Its south-key location also provides faster access to St. Armands Circle and downtown Sarasota compared to mid- or north-key neighborhoods.

About Neighborhood Description:
Longbeach Village is the historic north-end settlement of Longboat Key and offers one of the most distinct living environments on the island. Originally established as a fishing village in the early 1900s, the area retains an “Old Florida” character with a mix of cottages, bungalows, and newer custom homes built on original platted streets.

Unlike master-planned or gated neighborhoods, Longbeach Village feels more like a small coastal town. Residents are drawn to its walkability, local dining spots, and proximity to north-end Gulf beaches. Because of the age of the area, buyers should pay close attention to elevation, flood zones, and redevelopment constraints tied to older parcels and infrastructure.

Ownership policies such as leasing and pet restrictions should always be verified directly with the association, but some community sources reference a three-month minimum lease and pet limitations.
